calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Judgmkent On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgmkent On The Pleadings is Granted. No opposition filed.

After hearing, the court signed the proposed order and judgment included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Continued To Mar-18-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Jennifer Myers, Reese Law Group, for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, telephone (760) 842-5850 (CourtCall)
No other appearances.

The motion is uncontested. Plaintiff submits to the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance

The motion to deem admitted is GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. CCP 2033.280. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and submit by email to sborrowman@gmail.com. Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
